home.seoHomeTitle: Free Web Developer Tools — 100% Client-Side, Full Privacy
home.seoHomeDesc: FormattedAI is a collection of free online tools for web developers and content creators. Every tool runs entirely in your browser — no server uploads, no accounts, no cookies, no tracking.
home.seoHomeTool1: Markdown Formatter — Paste text from ChatGPT, Claude or any AI assistant and copy perfectly formatted documents to Google Docs or Microsoft Word. Supports tables, code blocks, task lists. Export to HTML, DOCX or Markdown.
home.seoHomeTool2: AVIF Converter — Convert PNG, JPG and WebP images to modern AVIF format with up to 50% better compression. Batch conversion with quality presets and ZIP download. WebAssembly for universal browser support.
home.seoHomeTool3: SEO & GEO Tag Generator — Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, Schema.org JSON-LD, llms.txt and robots.txt. The first tool combining traditional SEO with Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).
home.seoHomeTool4: PDF Tools — Merge, split, compress PDF files and convert images to PDF. Everything runs in the browser — your documents never leave your device.
home.seoHomeTool5: HTML to PDF — Convert HTML code to a PDF document. Paste source code or enter a page URL and download a ready PDF file with styles and layout preserved.
home.seoHomeTool6: HEIC Converter — Convert HEIC/HEIF photos from iPhone and iPad to JPG, PNG or modern AVIF. Choose output format, set quality and download files. WASM decoding, 100% client-side.
home.seoHomeWhyText: Traditional web tools upload your data to a server. FormattedAI works differently — all processing happens in your browser via JavaScript and WebAssembly. Your documents, images and metadata stay on your device.
home.seoHomeGeoText: GEO is the next evolution of SEO. AI search engines (ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overview) are becoming mainstream. The SEO & GEO Tag Generator helps create Schema.org structured data, llms.txt files, and configure robots.txt for AI crawlers.

about.pageTitle: About FormattedAI — Free Privacy-Focused Web Tools
about.metaDescription: FormattedAI is a collection of free tools for web developers and content creators. Everything runs in your browser — your data never leaves your device.
about.aboutPageSubtitle: Free tools for web developers and content creators. Everything runs in your browser — zero uploads, full privacy.
about.aboutMissionText1: FormattedAI was born from a simple need — web dev tools should be free, fast, and safe. Every tool runs 100% client-side. Your files, text, and data never leave your device.
about.aboutMissionText2: We don't collect data, don't require accounts, and don't show ads. Just open the page and use it.
about.aboutToolFormatter: Convert text from ChatGPT and Claude into formatted documents for Google Docs and Microsoft Word.
about.aboutToolAvif: Convert PNG, JPG and WebP images to modern AVIF format with better compression.
about.aboutToolJsMinifier: Minify and beautify JavaScript. Reduce JS file size or format minified code.
about.aboutToolCssMinifier: Minify and beautify CSS. Reduce stylesheet file sizes without losing functionality.
about.aboutToolSeoGeo: Generate SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Schema.org and optimize for AI search engines.
about.aboutToolPdf: Merge, split, compress PDF files and convert images to PDF. 100% in-browser.
about.aboutToolHtmlToPdf: Convert HTML code to PDF. Paste code or enter a URL and download a ready PDF file.
about.aboutToolHeic: Convert HEIC/HEIF photos from iPhone to JPG, PNG or AVIF. WASM decoding, 100% in-browser.
about.aboutPrivacyText: Every FormattedAI tool runs exclusively in your browser. We have no backend server, don't store files, and don't log activity. The only thing we save is your preferences (language, theme) in your browser's localStorage — on your device.
about.faq1a: FormattedAI is a collection of free online tools for web developers and content creators. It includes a Markdown Formatter, AVIF Converter, JS Minifier, CSS Minifier, SEO & GEO Tag Generator, PDF Tools, and HTML to PDF converter. All tools run 100% in your browser.
about.faq2a: Yes. All tools run entirely in your browser. Your files and data never leave your device — nothing is sent to any server.
about.faq3a: FormattedAI is completely free. No accounts, no subscriptions, no hidden fees. The project is open-source under the MIT license.
about.faq4a: GEO is a new standard for optimizing content for AI search engines — ChatGPT Search, Perplexity, Google AI Overview. It uses structured data (Schema.org), llms.txt files, and AI crawler configuration in robots.txt.
about.aboutAuthorText: FormattedAI is created by Adam Szczotka. The project is open-source and available on GitHub.

privacy.privacyIntroText: FormattedAI is a set of tools that run 100% client-side. We do not collect, store, or process any personal data. Your files and data never leave your device.
privacy.privacyDataText: None. We have no backend server, don't log visits, and don't use cookies or analytics tools.
privacy.privacyLocalText: The only data saved on your device are user preferences in browser localStorage:
privacy.privacyLocal3: Tool form data (e.g. SEO Tag Generator) — for autofill convenience
privacy.privacyLocalClear: You can delete this data at any time by clearing your browser localStorage or clicking the "Clear" button in any tool.
privacy.privacyFilesText: Files you upload to tools (e.g. images in AVIF Converter) are processed exclusively in your browser. They are never sent to any server.
privacy.privacyCdnText: The site loads fonts from Google Fonts and (in AVIF Converter) a WASM module from esm.sh. These services may log HTTP requests.
privacy.privacyContactText: Privacy questions? Contact us via GitHub Issues.
